name: StatePill
description: Always-visible-when-active component for recording state. Single anchor for 'is the mic open / who is talking'. Three states: recording (red), speaking (warning), listening (red, calmer).

platformNotes.ios: On iPhone with Dynamic Island, the island itself expands to host this content via ActivityKit. Off-island fallback is a sticky pill below the status bar.
platformNotes.web: Class .pill-recording / .pill-state. Fixed height, dot + label inline.
platformNotes.swiftui: ActivityKit live activity expanded leading/trailing regions render the dot + label.
